stemHtml: Where must a NO ENTRY sign be located?

options.a: At the beginning of the prohibited area, on each side of the taxiway.
options.b: At the beginning of the prohibited area, on the left side of the taxiway only.
options.c: 50 m before the prohibited area, on the left side of the taxiway.
options.d: 50 m before the prohibited area, on each side of the taxiway.
